15.reason: Error: scanf("%s",s) stops reading at whitespace, so expressions with spaces (e.g., "5 - 1 * 2") will not be fully read. Use gets() or fgets() instead.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  Error: scanf("%s",s) stops reading at whitespace, so expressions with spaces (e.g., "5 - 1 * 2") will not be fully read. Use gets() or fgets() instead.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  Error: scanf("%s",s) stops reading at whitespace, but the expression may contain spaces. Use gets() or fgets() instead to read the entire line including spaces.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  Error: Using scanf("%s") reads only non-whitespace tokens. The arithmetic expression may contain spaces, so this will not read the entire line, causing the loop to miss the '=' terminator and potentially access out-of-bounds array indices. Use gets(s) instead.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: scanf("%s") cannot read spaces; the expression may contain spaces, causing incorrect parsing and potential infinite loop. Use gets(s) or fgets(s, sizeof(s), stdin) instead.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  scanf("%s") stops reading at whitespace, but the problem states the expression may contain spaces. It should be replaced with gets(s) to read the entire line.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  scanf("%s", s) stops reading at whitespace, so it cannot correctly parse expressions containing spaces as required by the problem. It should be replaced with gets(s) or fgets(s, sizeof(s), stdin).
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Using scanf with %s reads only until the first whitespace, but the input expression may contain spaces. This causes incomplete reading of the expression.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Using scanf with %s reads only until the first whitespace, but the input expression may contain spaces. This causes the program to read only part of the expression before '='. Use fgets or handle space skipping manually.]
